blueprints/ai-assistant/blueprint.json.title: AI Assistant
blueprints/ai-assistant/blueprint.json.description: AI-powered chat interface to modify your WordPress to your liking. Bring your own key or use a local LLM
blueprints/ai-assistant/blueprint.json.author: Alex Kirk

blueprints/chat-to-blog/blueprint.json.title: Chat to Blog
blueprints/chat-to-blog/blueprint.json.description: Import media from Beeper chats and create blog posts. Requires Beeper Desktop running.
blueprints/chat-to-blog/blueprint.json.author: Alex Kirk

blueprints/post-collection/blueprint.jso.title: Collect Posts from the Web
blueprints/post-collection/blueprint.jso.description: Use the Post Collection Plugin to save articles from around the web
blueprints/post-collection/blueprint.jso.author: Alex Kirk

blueprints/cookbook/blueprint.json.title: Cookbook
blueprints/cookbook/blueprint.json.description: Store your recipes in your WordPress, with ingredients, steps, and prep/cook times. Paste a URL to pull a recipe in from the web.
blueprints/cookbook/blueprint.json.author: Alex Kirk

blueprints/memex/blueprint.json.title: Memex
blueprints/memex/blueprint.json.description: Turn WordPress into a note-taking app with bi-directional links, automatic backlinks, daily notes, tags, and reminders. Import notes from Obsidian, Notion, Evernote, or Roam Research with one click.
blueprints/memex/blueprint.json.author: Alex Kirk

blueprints/personal-crm/blueprint.json.title: Personal CRM
blueprints/personal-crm/blueprint.json.description: Manage your contacts and relationships directly from WordPress
blueprints/personal-crm/blueprint.json.author: Alex Kirk

blueprints/rss-reader/blueprint.json.title: RSS Reader
blueprints/rss-reader/blueprint.json.description: Follow friends and consume their content in your WordPress
blueprints/rss-reader/blueprint.json.author: Alex Kirk

blueprints/wordcamp-companion/blueprint..title: WordCamp Companion
blueprints/wordcamp-companion/blueprint..description: A tool to help you plan your WordCamp attendance.
blueprints/wordcamp-companion/blueprint..author: Alex Kirk

blueprints/wordopedia/blueprint.json.title: Wordopedia
blueprints/wordopedia/blueprint.json.description: Search, browse, and save Wikipedia articles and snippets.
blueprints/wordopedia/blueprint.json.author: Alex Kirk
